name: API Access Agreement
description: Pay-per-call or subscription API access contract between an agent (buyer) and API provider (seller). Covers rate limits, SLA uptime, x402 payment terms, and data handling.

buyer_name.description: Legal name of the API consumer / principal

buyer_agent_id.description: Wallet address of the agent consuming the API

seller_name.description: Legal name of the API provider

seller_agent_id.description: Wallet address of the provider agent (if agent-to-agent)

price_per_call.description: Cost per API call in specified currency (for per-call model)

sla_response_ms.description: Maximum p95 response time in milliseconds

data_retention_days.description: How long request/response data is retained

data_processing_location.description: Geographic restriction on data processing (e.g. EU, US)

x402_enabled.description: Whether x402 HTTP payment protocol is used
